title: Immersive Posts
description: Extendable treated-wood, aluminium, steel posts and more for ImmersiveEngineering.
body:
# This is an add-on mod for [ImmersiveEngineering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveengineering)
### Inspired by ImmersiveIntegration's extendable posts.

Put simply this mod allows you to have *very* tall posts with some different types to choose from, instead of just the Treated-Wood, Aluminum and Steel variants.  
Just grab yourself the **Extendable Post** and a material of your choice (See list below) and rightlick away on it or on the posts themself after for better visibility.

---
### I highly recommend checking the in-game manual provided by ImmersiveEngineering for more indepth informations.
---

## List of available types

### Default
- Treated Wood  
- Aluminium  
- Steel

### 0.1.0+
- Nether Brick  
- Iron  
- Gold  
- Copper  
- Lead  
- Silver  
- Nickel  
- Constantan  
- Electrum  
- Uranium

### 0.1.3+
- Concrete  
- Concrete (Leaded)

## Modpack
### Modrinth Packs:  
**You can** link to here and ***it will be appreciated*** but it's **not** required.

### External Packs
Give proper credit and provide a link to this [Project-Page](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveposts) or the [GitHub](https://github.com/TwistedGate/ImmersivePosts) repo.

### All
Don't be a jerk.

# If you have questions don't hesitate to ask! I don't bite!

### You may not host this mod for download on any other source except as part of a pack.
### Always link back to this page when sharing this mod with the intent that it be downloaded.
### Do not redistribute this mod unless as part of a pack!
### Link back to this Modrinth page!
